headlines.title: SpaceX stock tumbles 23% from its high, as average investor sees gains wiped out
headlines.description: Shares of Elon Musk’s SpaceX tech conglomerate plunged 16% Monday to close below their price on June 12, after the company’s massive initial public offering.

headlines.title: Bill that would mandate AI chip location tracking gains industry support
headlines.description: Half a dozen companies came out in support of the Chips Security Act, which would require location-tracking mechanisms for America’s most advanced computing chips

headlines.title: AI helped diagnose 18 children whose rare diseases had stumped doctors
headlines.description: Researchers from Boston Children’s Hospital identified 18 diagnoses for children with rare diseases using OpenAI’s o3 model.

headlines.title: How AI is helping fans follow the action and golfers navigate the rules at the U.S. Open
headlines.description: The U.S. Open at Shinnecock Hills showcases how the USGA is using AI technology to transform golf.

headlines.title: Lionel Messi breaks record for most career World Cup goals
headlines.description: Lionel Messi has broken the record for the most career goals at the World Cup by scoring in Argentina's game against Austria.

headlines.title: Inside Iran, World Cup team brings joy despite uncertainty around U.S. peace talks
headlines.description: “Even during wartime, people would still spend time together and try to enjoy life. What else could we do? Life had to go on,” one fan said.

headlines.title: ‘Country Roads’ is taking the World Cup by storm
headlines.description: World Cup fans were united this weekend by a song synonymous with belonging, nostalgia and the yearning for home

headlines.title: From The Sports Desk: What will Messi, Mbappé and Haaland do for an encore?
headlines.description: Last week, Argentina’s Lionel Messi, France’s Kylian Mbappé and Norway’s Erling Haaland scored a combined seven goals on the same day.

headlines.title: Could advanced prosthetic hands revolutionize robotics?
headlines.description: A company that creates technologically-advanced prosthetic hands is working to advance bionic hand grip and dexterity technology for humans and robots. NBC News’ Steve Patterson reports.

headlines.title: New Study Sparks Questions Over Uber and Lyft's Ride Pricing
headlines.description: A new Consumer Reports investigation finds Uber and Lyft customers are often given different fares when they book the same rides at the same time. While Uber and Lyft have long used surge pricing, the new findings are raising questions about whether the apps are using personalized or surveillance pricing based on customers’ personal data. NBC’s Vicky Nguyen reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Fox Corp. to buy video streaming giant Roku for $22 billion
headlines.description: Fox Corp. announced plans to acquire the video streaming giant Roku in a deal valued at $22 billion. NBC News’ Brian Cheung spoke with Natalie Jarvey from “The Ankler” to discuss what this means for Roku and its millions of users.

headlines.title: Elon Musk becomes first trillionaire after SpaceX IPO
headlines.description: Elon Musk became the world's first trillionaire after his company SpaceX began trading publicly. SpaceX is the first of what is expected to be many major IPOs related to AI.
